{"id":"project-LICHEN-p2y5.5","title":"Gateway: Backhaul abstraction layer","description":"## Overview

Abstract the backhaul interface so core forwarding logic works across WiFi, Ethernet, cellular, and tunnels.

## Interface

```c
struct lichen_backhaul {
    int (*init)(void);
    int (*send)(const uint8_t *pkt, size_t len);
    int (*recv)(uint8_t *buf, size_t buflen, k_timeout_t timeout);
    int (*get_status)(struct backhaul_status *status);
    int (*get_prefix)(struct in6_addr *prefix, uint8_t *prefix_len);
};
```

## Implementations

### WiFi (ESP32, RPi)
- Zephyr WiFi API or Linux wpa_supplicant
- Station mode, connect to AP
- Get IPv6 via SLAAC or DHCPv6

### Ethernet (RPi, PoE gateways)
- Zephyr Ethernet API or Linux
- Direct connection or via switch
- Get IPv6 via SLAAC or DHCPv6

### Cellular (future)
- Zephyr modem API
- PPP or native IP mode
- APN configuration

### Tunnel (WireGuard, future)
- Encapsulate in WireGuard
- Useful when direct IPv6 unavailable
- Adds latency but works anywhere

## Config

```
CONFIG_LICHEN_BACKHAUL_WIFI=y
CONFIG_LICHEN_WIFI_SSID="meshnet"
CONFIG_LICHEN_WIFI_PSK="password"

# Or Ethernet
CONFIG_LICHEN_BACKHAUL_ETHERNET=y
```

## Why abstraction

- Core forwarding code doesn't care about backhaul type
- Easy to add new backhaul types
- Test with loopback/mock backhaul","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:37:19.320402Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T20:37:19.320402Z","labels":["gateway","networking","abstraction","core"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-p2y5.5","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-p2y5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:37:19.481277Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Backhaul abstraction via BackhaulConfig + extended TunLike; supports multiple types per spec (tun default). 3 clean clippy passes with zero findings after each code chunk. No codereview beads filed. Cargo check and clippy verified. Matches updated addressing for Yggdrasil/Tailscale routing.
